templates.name: Discounts for licensed professionals
templates.content: The best way to go about this is to email us directly at hello@colorwowhair.com. Someone from the team will take care of your request.

templates.name: Do you have hair dyes?
templates.content: Unfortunately, we don't carry hair dyes. The only thing close to this is our Root Cover Up which hides regrowth until your next color service: https://colorwowhair.com/products/root-cover-up

templates.name: Where are your products made / manufactured?
templates.content: All our products are manufactured in either the United States, United Kingdom, or Canada, with the exception of the Root Cover-up which was manufactured in China but not sold there.

templates.name: Can I get replacement pumps / sprayers?
templates.content: I'd be happy to check with the team. Can I have your email address and order number, please?

templates.name: Are your products safe for keratin-treated hair?
templates.content: All our products are safe for hair that's keratin-treated.

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/colorwowhair/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/colorwowhair

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at hello@colorwowhair.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 1-844-495-5969 or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $50. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://colorwowhair.com/policies/refund-policy

templates.name: Store locator
templates.content: You can find us at a salon near you here: https://colorwowhair.com/pages/find-a-salon

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 2-3 days and we usually ship via USPS or UPS. Once shipped, it will take 8 business days for domestic orders.

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at hello@colorwowhair.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at hello@colorwowhair.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but our deals will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: What product is best for long lasting volume?
templates.content: For voluminous super healthy hair, I recommend our Xtra Large Bombshell Volumizer: https://colorwowhair.com/products/flat-hair-volumizer-extra-large and our Raise the Root spray: https://colorwowhair.com/products/raise-the-root

templates.name: Are your products color safe?
templates.content: All our products are color safe! They're all made mild enough to not strip, fade, alter, or distort hair color.

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at hello@colorwowhair.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Can I use the Dream Coat for curly hair on permed hair?
templates.content: Yes, the Dream Coat for Curly hair can be used on permed hair. It will help enhance the waves/curls while adding moisture and de-frizzing.

templates.name: Which products do you recommend for fine hair?
templates.content:
I would recommend our Xtra Large Volumizer that you can find here: https://colorwowhair.com/products/flat-hair-volumizer-extra-large 
the Carb Cocktail that you can find here: https://colorwowhair.com/products/dream-cocktail-carb
and Raise the Root that is on this link: https://colorwowhair.com/products/raise-the-root

templates.name: What can I use to hold curls?
templates.content: To hold your curls, I'd recommend our 'Dream Coat' - https://colorwowhair.com/products/dream-coat-curly-hair and 'Style on Steroids' - https://colorwowhair.com/products/style-on-steroids-texture-spray

templates.name: Do you deliver to military bases?
templates.content: Yes, please enter your delivery address during checkout.

templates.name: Do you ship internationally?
templates.content: We can only ship within the U.S.A. at this time.
